description: Workbook 6 — Client deliverable review, feedback collection, revision cycles, and CAD Lock

cells.A: To be filled after 3D modeling but BEFORE drafting. Compares physical measurements to CAD model.
Did we model 'as-is' (including wear/damage) or did we 'correct' the design?
The 3D model is verified as an accurate representation.

cells.A: Standardization of measured values to engineering norms (e.g.19.95mm measured -> 20.00mm modeled).
Has the 3D model been checked for 'clashes' or 'interferences'? (Yes/No):
Does the model mass match the physical machine weight (+/- 5%)? (Yes/No):
3D model is frozen. Proceed to 2D production drawings (D6.5.1).

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.J: The central Hub tracking all client feedback, active revisions, and approval statuses across the department.
The formal dispatch of the initial design package (watermarked PDFs/renders) to the client prior to the meeting.
The calendar invite establishing the boundaries and agenda for the formal design review meeting.
The live capture of the client's initial reactions and high-level feedback during the presentation.
A blank, standardized form sent to the client to force them to write down their exact requested changes clearly.
The internal tracker logging every single change requested by the client.
The PM's analysis determining if the requested changes are within the D2 Contract or require a billable Change Order.
The formal work orders sent to the CAD team to actually execute the approved changes.
The finalized, updated design files prepared for final client handover.
The Head of Engineering's confirmation that the revisions match the tickets and meet IMHOGEN quality standards.
The legal "CAD Lock" document where the client formally accepts the design and authorizes fabrication.
The internal trigger closing the Design Phase and unblocking the Fabrication/Production Phase.

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.A: The engineering team at IMHOGEN LTD has successfully completed the initial design phase for [Project Name].

Please find the preliminary Technical Data Package linked above for your review. Note that these are view-only conceptual documents intended to prepare you for our upcoming formal Presentation Meeting.

We strongly advise reviewing these documents internally with your stakeholders prior to our meeting. We will send a calendar invite shortly to walk you through the design decisions and gather your feedback.

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.A: Following the delivery of your preliminary design package, we would like to formally present the engineering solutions developed for [Project Name].
This meeting is a critical milestone where we will demonstrate how the design meets your original technical requirements. Our agenda will be as follows:
1. Review of Original Scope & Constraints (5 mins)
4. Next Steps & Formal Feedback Process Explanation (5 mins)
Please confirm if [Date/Time] works for your primary decision-makers.

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.H: [e.g. "Looks too bulky. Can we reduce the footprint?"]
cells.N: [e.g. Explained that reducing footprint compromises motor stability. Client understood.]

cells.H: [e.g. "We need physical buttons,not just a touch screen."]
[Highly Satisfied / Minor Tweaks Needed / Major Redesign Requested]

cells.A: Did the PM explicitly explain the D6.4 Formal Feedback Form process?
Will the D6.4 Form be dispatched within 24 hours of this meeting?

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.A: D6.4 CLIENT FEEDBACK FORM (To be completed by Client)
2.0 FORMAL REVISION REQUESTS (Client fills this section)

By signing below, the client confirms that these are the consolidated and final revision requests for this design phase. Additional requests submitted after this form may be subject to additional billing and timeline extensions.

cells.T: [Confirmed. Will remove all mobile UI/UX and API tasks from the engineering backlog.]

cells.A: Have all items from the D6.4 Client Form been accurately transferred to this log?

cells.A: Do any requested changes require a commercial Change Order to be issued to the client?
Do the approved "In Scope" changes push the project past the D4.8 Locked Timeline?
Is the assessment complete and ready to be translated into Engineering Tickets (D6.7)?

cells.A: D6.7 ENGINEERING REVISION TICKETS (CAD Work Orders)
2.0 REVISION WORK ORDERS (Assigned to CAD Team)

cells.M: [e.g. Adjust sheet metal parameters to 115L capacity and update flat patterns.]
[e.g. Update BOM color spec to Safety Yellow (RAL 1028).]

cells.A: Have all assigned engineers marked their tickets as "Done"?
Are the updated native files saved in the central project repository?

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.A: D6.8 REVISED TECHNICAL DATA PACKAGE (TDP Version Control)
Have all older v1.0 files been moved to the "Archive" folder to prevent manufacturing errors?
Is the Revised TDP ready for internal QA Sign-off (D6.9)?

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.B: Do the updated CAD files explicitly match the exact requests from D6.7?
Did the revisions introduce any new dimensional clashes or interferences?
Is the updated Bill of Materials (BOM) accurate and synced with the new CAD?
Are manufacturing drawings fully dimensioned with standard GD&T?

cells.A: Is this design structurally sound, commercially viable, and ready for final client lock?

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.A: D6.10 DELIVERY & ACCEPTANCE FORM (Official CAD Lock)
By signing this document, the Client formally acknowledges and agrees to the following terms:
1. The engineering design, as represented in Technical Data Package (TDP) Version [Insert Version], meets all functional and technical requirements outlined in the original Project Brief.
2. All requested revisions and feedback have been satisfactorily incorporated by IMHOGEN LTD.

3. This constitutes a "CAD Lock." The design is now legally frozen. Any subsequent requests to alter the design, dimensions, or materials will require a formal Change Order, dimensions, subject to additional engineering fees and timeline extensions.
4. IMHOGEN LTD is officially authorized to proceed to the Procurement and Fabrication Phase based exactly on these approved drawings.
Has the fully executed D6.10 form been saved in the permanent client vault?

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.A: T3.D6.10a Drafting Final Approval & Asset Delivery
By signing,the client confirms the dimensions and specifications in the provided PDF set are correct.
IMHOGEN LTD formally closes this request. No further edits included under this SN.

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx

cells.A: D6.11 PROJECT PHASE CLOSURE NOTICE (Unlocking Fabrication)
Have all native CAD files been locked to "Read-Only" to prevent accidental edits?
Has the final Bill of Materials (BOM) been exported for Procurement?
Has Finance been notified to issue the next milestone invoice (if applicable)?
Has the physical build package been handed over to the Shop Floor Supervisor?
Is Phase 6 officially closed, and is the project moving to Active Fabrication (Phase 7)?

documents.source_file: 06RDBI_IMHO GEN Client Review and Approval Process.xlsx
